principal.actions: Independently audited the delegate route, implemented and checked the 41-unit normalization, ran the bounded proof-logging experiment and cold audit, and limited the result to UNKNOWN.

audit_decisions: Accepted the fixed-root q=20 route only after independently rederiving its complement/relabel coverage lemma.
Required the new CNF to be exactly the retained unsymmetrized body plus 41 unit clauses and verified that identity with a standalone checker.
Accepted the order-6 exhaustive property test and normalized R(3,3,6) DRAT/LRAT control as semantic controls, not as proof of the general lemma.
Rejected any inference from UNKNOWN, partial DRAT size, supplied-corpus comparison, or almost-regularity to the value of R(5,5).
Rejected immediate q=17--19 runs after the normalized q=20 monolith also timed out.
Did not spawn new subagents in the Sol pass.
